name: Probability Race
short_description: Probability Race is a futuristic racing game. You must use logic, math, probability and luck to win the championship. Play a great variety of minigames and compete in turn based races every day. Unlock abilities and race your way to victory in this platform/stragegy/turnbased game.

Play a great variety of minigames  and compete in turn based races every day. Unlock abilities and race your way to victory in this platform/stragegy/turnbased game.
